result.stdout:
USAGE:
    processmanager [version] [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

ARGUMENTS:
    [version]    Version to run (e.g. 1.0.0); uses latest if not specified

OPTIONS:
                  DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help               Prints help information                
    -p, --port    38472      Port for the Process Manager IPC server

COMMANDS:
    run                                          
    install                                      
    uninstall                                    
    cleanup      Remove old versions, keep latest

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    processmanager [version] [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

ARGUMENTS:
    [version]    Version to run (e.g. 1.0.0); uses latest if not specified

OPTIONS:
                  DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help               Prints help information                
    -p, --port    38472      Port for the Process Manager IPC server

COMMANDS:
    run                                          
    install                                      
    uninstall                                    
    cleanup      Remove old versions, keep latest

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Remove old versions, keep latest

USAGE:
    processmanager cleanup [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help     Prints help information                            
    -f, --force    Remove all versions except latest without prompting

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Remove old versions, keep latest

USAGE:
    processmanager cleanup [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help     Prints help information                            
    -f, --force    Remove all versions except latest without prompting

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    processmanager install [version] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [version]    Version to install (e.g. 1.0.0); defaults to 1.0.0

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help      Prints help information                                     
    -s, --source    Path to ProcessManager.Host build output (e.g.              
                    bin/Debug/net10.0). If not set, uses                        
                    PROCESSMANAGER_RUNNER_SOURCE or auto-discovered path

commands.payload:

    -s, --source    Path to ProcessManager.Host build output (e.g.              
                    bin/Debug/net10.0). If not set, uses                        
                    PROCESSMANAGER_RUNNER_SOURCE or auto-discovered path

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    processmanager uninstall [version] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [version]    Version to uninstall (e.g. 1.0.0), or 'all' to remove all      
                 installed versions                                             

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    processmanager uninstall [version] [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    [version]    Version to uninstall (e.g. 1.0.0), or 'all' to remove all      
                 installed versions                                             

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
